text: The system shall accept commands with invalid sequence numbers.
The system shall reject commands with invalid sequence numbers.
The vehicle shall allow mission launch when battery temperature exceeds the configured limit.
The vehicle shall inhibit mission launch when battery temperature exceeds the configured limit.
The UAV shall maintain altitude within configured tolerance.
The system shall retry communication within 3 seconds.
The telemetry service shall archive messages for the configured retention period.
The telemetry service shall archive messages for 30 days.
The update manager shall verify update signatures before installation.
The update manager shall install update packages before signature verification.
